# ThousandYen Digital Kits

Japanese static site for low-price digital templates and free tools.

Canonical:
- Home: /

Product pages:
- /products/listing-template-pack.html
- /products/first-sale-checklist.html
- /products/ai-worklog-template.html

Free articles:
- /articles/listing-copy-template.html
- /articles/first-sale-checklist.html
- /articles/ai-worklog-template.html

Free samples:
- /bundles/listing-template-pack-preview.md
- /bundles/first-sale-checklist-sample.md
- /bundles/ai-worklog-template-sample.md

Products:
- 商品ページ即貼りテンプレ50: listing copy templates for BOOTH, note, and coconala.
- 初回販売チェックリスト: pre-launch checklist for first-time digital product sellers.
- AI作業ログ・振り返りテンプレ集: AI worklog, failure-note, prompt-improvement, and weekly-review templates.

Safety:
- Templates only.
- No sales, approval, legal, tax, or productivity guarantees.
- Purchase terms must be confirmed on the external marketplace page after checkout URLs exist.
